title: SG19 2DL, The Royal Society For The Protection of Birds: environmental permit application advertisement - EPR/VB3140KN/A001
body: " The Environment Agency consults the public on certain applications for:   waste and mining waste operations installations water discharge and groundwater activities medium combustion plant and specified generators   The arrangements are explained in their Public Participation Statement  These notices explain:   what the application is about when you need to comment by   The Environment Agency will decide:   whether to grant or refuse the application what conditions to include in the permit (if granted)   "
